summary: Updated repeated-bugs conditional rule to reference systematic-debugging skill and enhanced debug-logging-auto-behavior.md with skill phase tracking functionality
learnings: Skill phase tracking adds semantic context to debug logs, making pattern analysis more meaningful
Rule updates that reference skills should include both the skill path and key checkpoints for immediate accessibility
notes: The --skill-phase parameter is documented as optional for manual use. All existing script functionality remains backward compatible. The debug logging doc now provides clear guidance on which phase to use in different debugging scenarios.
